name: mythosforge-promptpack
description: Compose a generator-ready prompt from a curated recipe library, optionally themed with a brandkit token. No API key, no network — pure composition.

env.note: No key needed — pure prompt composition, no network.

subject.note: what to drop into the recipe's {subject} slot

theme.note: optional brandkit.json to fold in (feel_words + prompt_suffix -> prompt, anti_feel -> negative)

recipes.note: optional custom recipe library JSON (overrides bundled recipes.json)

out.note: optional path to write the composed prompt JSON

output: JSON on stdout: { ok, recipe, prompt, model, aspect, negative }. Feed `prompt` (+ model/aspect) to a generator like mythosforge-imagegen.

runtimes.tool-use-llm: hand tool-schema.json (openai or anthropic block) to the model; host runs invoke on the tool call. Works with OpenAI, Anthropic, Bankr LLM Gateway, Surplus, and any function-calling model.
